story.text:
# 🚪 Covenant of Humanistic Technologies
**gateway** · shared · narrative

Sister city · external manifest.human.tech. Every individual is able to prove their personhood without dependence on gatekeeping authorities. The personhood-by-signing covenant whose internal quarter is the Temple Precinct.

## Edges in

- [[City of Mages]] *gateway_to* →
- [[City of Mages]] *kin_to* →
